name: illuminati Simulator VR
short_description: A completely accurate Freemasonry temple. as well as an Ordo Templi Orientis Gnostic Mass working lodge when you purchase this title you can expect to be teleported to a virtual freemasonry lodge where you will be able to perform any ritual you may want in a safe place.
detailed_description:
Non VR Supported but not reccomended

The game can Run in Non VR mode, but the "grip" buttons are in the mouse button. you cannot move your arms in non VR mode which makes hard to move and open doors or hold Items, but not impossible


About the Game

This Simulator transports you into a REAL Illuminati  Freemason lodge temple, According to the known texts, each room and object was displayed according to the manuals of the Free-masonic Ancient and Accepted texts,  The Map has a lot of secrets only members of the order know,  If you are already a freemason and you want to checkout a cool temple built with the specifications of the liturgy (*except for the parking lot areas)  Includes reflection chambers, agape rooms,gnostic mass with the Thelema specs, The secrets involve gesture recognition , puzzles and more, its designed mainly for VR however you can manage to getby with a gamepad if you are patient enough to figure out. the game is also sensitive to the time you log in and the day, its not the same to login at a random hour than at 6pm for example.
